text.title: Proposal Red Team Checklist Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for a `RedTeamChecklist`. Forbidden patterns + valid/invalid examples enforce the five core rules.

list.item: Any `item.killer_anchor` missing or matching generic text — violates `r3-killer-items-only`.

example.note: owner.person empty; mode invalid; last_reviewed stale; single-item pause-point; missing executor/artefact/killer_anchor; text too short.
